backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that fetches metal prices from the IBJA rates API via HTTP outcalls and sets up a recurring timer to update prices every 10 seconds.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two frontend features—live price polling with fallback in useQueries.ts and auto-refresh UI indicators in LiveRatesDashboard.tsx/MetalTicker.tsx—to their associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing component responsibilities, styling decisions, and hook behaviors across the application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Silver Gold Refinery' and mounting the app at the #root div via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full page layout by rendering BrandTicker, MetalTicker, FloatingCallButton, HeroSection, LiveRatesDashboard, ProductsSection, ContactSection, SocialMediaAssets, and Footer in order.
frontend/src/components/BrandTicker.tsx: Simple presentational component rendering the 'GURURAJ BULLION' brand name as a large, bold, centered heading on a dark background.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section card displaying a WhatsApp phone number with a direct chat button and a background refinery image overlay, using green-themed styling.
frontend/src/components/FloatingCallButt: Draggable floating phone button that persists its position in sessionStorage, supports mouse and touch drag with click-vs-drag discrimination, and links to a tel: URI.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year, a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link styled in yellow, on a dark neutral-950 background.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section with a full-bleed furnace background image, dark gradient overlay, and animated fade-in text content promoting the refinery's precious metals offering.
frontend/src/components/LiveRatesDashboa: React dashboard component that displays live IBJA gold and silver metal rates with market status indicators, relative timestamp, and a manual refresh button.
frontend/src/components/MetalTicker.tsx: Compact ticker bar component showing live IBJA gold and silver prices with up/down trend indicators and a pulse animation when prices update.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Memoized card component displaying a precious metal product with its image, purity levels, and optional available formats.
Section component rendering a grid of ProductCards for Silver and Gold products alongside refinery process images with overlay captions.
frontend/src/components/SocialMediaAsset: Section component that previews and provides a download button for a 1080×1080 Instagram sponsorship image promoting live gold and silver rates.
frontend/src/config/api.ts: Exports API configuration constants for the IBJA rates endpoint, backend fetch interval (10s), and request timeout (8s).
frontend/src/config/fallback.ts: Defines hardcoded fallback INR prices for Gold 999 per 10g and Silver 999 per kg used when live rates are unavailable.
frontend/src/config/refresh.ts: Exports React Query refresh settings including a 10-second refetch interval and 9-second stale time for live IBJA rate polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an InternetIdentityProvider component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a React Query hook that fetches live gold and silver prices from the IBJA API, computes GST breakdowns, detects market open/closed status, and falls back to hardcoded values on failure. Includes module-level state to track price change timing for market-closed detection.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet using Tailwind CSS with a full OKLCH-based design token system for light and dark modes, including metallic gold/silver theme colors and utility transition classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/ibja.ts: TypeScript interfaces defining the shape of IBJA rates API responses and metal price data structures used across the frontend.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH CSS variable-based colors, custom shadows, border radii, font families, and animation keyframes, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Gururaj Bullion app's current features, pending auto-refresh and backend IBJA integration tasks, and architectural notes about live price sourcing with fallback values.
